text:
is a book published by Ohta Publishing on 01 March 1997.

Overview

The book is divided into three separate parts. The first is a lengthy interview with Hideaki Anno conducted by Kentaro Takekuma. They discuss the director's career, from his childhood in Ube to his work on Neon Genesis Evangelion, through the creation of GAINAX and his work at . The second part is a collection of interviews with members of GAINAX. They share their thoughts on working with him during the production of Evangelion. The speakers are Yoshiyuki Sadamoto, Masayuki, Hiroki Sato, Toshimichi Ōtsuki, and Kazuya Tsurumaki. The book concludes with an essay written by Takekuma about his relationship with Evangelion.
